Body line 110-111: 'Phase 2 audit busywork — Claude returned 12 items instead of 5. Re-run; enforce ranking; student picks top 3.'
Line 25: 'Not an epic. Not a typo-fix. A real slice you'd send off rather than nudge bit by bit, with a done you can name in a sentence.'
